name: app
description: cria o diretorio api e app no diretorio app via terminal  npm init -y cria o arquivo principal

scripts.build: vite build && vite build --config vite.config.equipe2.mjs && vite build --config vite.config.equipe25.mjs && (cd equipe-18 && npm install && npm run build; exit 0) && (cd views/etec && npm install && npm run build) && (cd views/etec64 && npm install && npm run build; exit 0) && (cd equipe-5 && npm install && VITE_API_URL=https://gceic26.onrender.com npm run build; exit 0)
